codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review passed. Reviewed the worker handoff for commit `140a6e3129014f3d0ee4d44cb1c0d5d7515bc0a4` together with the supporting parity-closure diff already on branch (`ff350f34fb95a5d8d492696d89dcfdfb1621c1a4`). The feature stayed within scope: it used the new parity runner to validate the active recovery stack, then closed only the real local parity blockers by tightening `ci/pr_manifests/pr_auth_tenant.txt` and `ci/pr_manifests/pr_business_slice.txt`, adding the delegated truthsuite bridge `TS_RuntimePortalBoundaryDelegatedCoverageTest`, expanding targeted portal and RBAC tests, normalizing `ci/pr_manifests/pr_accounting.txt`, and adding focused `FinishedGoodsReservationEngineTest` replay coverage. The recorded parity reruns for PRs #100, #101, and #102 all passed locally, with PR #102 correctly skipping changed-files coverage because its diff has no runtime source changes. I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation issues in the reviewed scope.

summary: Pass. Validated the active recovery stack with the local parity runner and closed the remaining real portal-boundary and final-hardening coverage blockers so PRs #100-#102 now have green local parity evidence, including an explicit no-runtime-diff changed-coverage skip for PR #102.
